findings.location: s2 — FILE to FILE section heading
findings.description: The knowledge file labels the section as "### FILE to FILE（非推奨）", but the source does not use the term "非推奨" (deprecated/not recommended). The source heading is "### 上記以外の組み合わせ(FILE to FILE)" and the body states "Nablarchバッチではこの形態は使用しません" (this form is not used), which is a stronger prohibition than "非推奨".
findings.source_evidence: Source heading: "### 上記以外の組み合わせ(FILE to FILE)". Source body: "Nablarchバッチではこの形態は使用しません。"
